case_title: WILLIAM H. DOWNING SR. TRUST VS. MICAH PILKINGTON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-25-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PAMELA LECHLEITERNER ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
